  <!-- Performance API Polyfills -->
  <script>
  (function () {
    var noop = function noop() {};
    if ("performance" in window === false) {
      window.performance = {};
    }
    window.performance.mark = performance.mark || noop;
    window.performance.measure = performance.measure || noop;
    if ("now" in window.performance === false) {
      var nowOffset = Date.now();
      if (performance.timing && performance.timing.navigationStart) {
        nowOffset = performance.timing.navigationStart;
      }
      window.performance.now = function now() {
        return Date.now() - nowOffset;
      };
    }
  })();
  </script>

    (function () {
      var now = Date.now()

<script data-url="https://static.parastorage.com/services/wix-thunderbolt/dist/sendFedopsLoadStarted.inline.cb06a6d1.bundle.min.js">(self.webpackJsonp__wix_thunderbolt_app=self.webpackJsonp__wix_thunderbolt_app||[]).push([[5987],{},function(n){"use strict";n.O(0,[8050,142],(function(){return p=4985,n(n.s=p);var p}));n.O()}]);</script>

  <!-- Polyfills check -->
  <script>
    if (
      typeof Promise === 'undefined' ||
      typeof Set === 'undefined' ||
      typeof Object.assign === 'undefined' ||
      typeof Array.from === 'undefined' ||
      typeof Symbol === 'undefined'
    ) {
      // send bi in order to detect the browsers in which polyfills are not working
      window.Sentry = {}
      window.fedops.phaseStarted('missing_polyfills')
    }
  </script>

  <!-- ES6 check -->
  <script>
    function isES6() {
      try {
        new Function('let x = 1');
        new Function('const x = `1`');
        new Function('class X {}');
        new Function('const x = (a = 0, ...b) => a');
        new Function('const x = {...Object}');
        new Function('const y = 1; const x = {y}');
      } catch (e) { return false; }

      return true;
    }

    if (!window.__browser_deprecation__ && !isES6()) {
      window.fedops.phaseStarted('es6_not_supported')
    }
  </script>

  <!-- Sentry -->

<script type="text/javascript">
    var bodyCacheable = false;
</script>




<script>window.clientSideRender = false;</script>


    <!--pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart start-->
    <script type="wix/htmlEmbeds" id="pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart start"></script>
    
    <script type="wix/htmlEmbeds" id="pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart end"></script>
    <!--pageHtmlEmbeds.bodyStart end-->




<script id="wix-first-paint">
    if (window.ResizeObserver &&
        (!window.PerformanceObserver || !PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes || PerformanceObserver.supportedEntryTypes.indexOf('paint') === -1)) {
        new ResizeObserver(function (entries, observer) {
            entries.some(function (entry) {
                var contentRect = entry.contentRect;
                if (contentRect.width > 0 && contentRect.height > 0) {
                    requestAnimationFrame(function (now) {
                        window.wixFirstPaint = now;
                        dispatchEvent(new CustomEvent('wixFirstPaint'));
                    });
                    observer.disconnect();
                    return true;
                }
            });
        }).observe(document.body);
    }
</script>

</div></span></div></a></div></div></div></div><div id="comp-kpdfzzbw" class="_2_2nr" data-testid="container"><div class="_3oi4n" data-testid="container-bg"></div><div data-mesh-id="comp-kpdfzzbwinlineContent" data-testid="inline-content" class=""><div data-mesh-id="comp-kpdfzzbwinlineContent-gridContainer" data-testid="mesh-container-content"><div id="comp-kpdg21vc"><a data-testid="linkElement" href="https://docs.google.com/forms/d/e/1FAIpQLSe_en18CWYJFx7uXvquKA2QQ49qWx-IreMyRRUkQ0Y9UAyvgw/viewform?usp=sf_link" target="_blank" rel="noopener" class="StylableButton1872886392__root style-kpdg4u36__root StylableButton1872886392__link" aria-label="Click Here to order"><div class="StylableButton1872886392__container"><span class="StylableButton1872886392__label" data-testid="stylablebutton-label">Click Here to order</span><span class="StylableButton1872886392__icon" aria-hidden="true"><div><svg data-bbox="13.05 2.55 33.878 54.8" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 60 60">
    <g>
        <path d="M46.5 28.9L20.6 3c-.6-.6-1.6-.6-2.2 0l-4.8 4.8c-.6.6-.6 1.6 0 2.2l19.8 20-19.9 19.9c-.6.6-.6 1.6 0 2.2l4.8 4.8c.6.6 1.6.6 2.2 0l21-21 4.8-4.8c.8-.6.8-1.6.2-2.2z"/>
    </g>
</svg>
</div></span></div></a></div><div id="comp-kpdg1f9k" class="_2bafp" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8" style="font-size:15px; line-height:1.3em"><span style="font-family:times new roman,times,serif"><span class="color_15"><span style="letter-spacing:0.03em"><span style="font-size:15px">To order your 2021 Baron Spirit Pack please click the link below and fill out the form, please include your First and Last Name and the Grade you will be entering next school year.</span></span></span></span></p></div></div></div></div><div id="comp-kox9olx5" class="Ued3M" title=""><div data-testid="linkElement" class="_2edl5"><wix-image id="img_comp-kox9olx5" class="rca7A _2ztx1" data-image-info="{&quot;containerId&quot;:&quot;comp-kox9olx5&quot;,&quot;displayMode&quot;:&quot;fill&quot;,&quot;imageData&quot;:{&quot;width&quot;:739,&quot;height&quot;:420,&quot;uri&quot;:&quot;40852c_84a7ae1aa46347dca2d788e7e72e0730~mv2.jpg&quot;,&quot;name&quot;:&quot;Incoming Freshman Parent night.jpg&quot;,&quot;displayMode&quot;:&quot;fill&quot;}}" data-bg-effect-name="" data-is-svg="false" data-is-svg-mask="false" data-image-zoomed="" data-has-ssr-src="true"><img src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/40852c_84a7ae1aa46347dca2d788e7e72e0730~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_531,h_302,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01/Incoming%20Freshman%20Parent%20night.jpg" alt="Incoming Freshman Parent night.jpg" style="width:536px;height:302px;object-fit:cover;object-position:50% 50%"/></wix-image></div></div><div id="comp-kox9rdzr" class="Ued3M" title=""><div data-testid="linkElement" class="_2edl5"><wix-image id="img_comp-kox9rdzr" class="rca7A _2ztx1" data-image-info="{&quot;containerId&quot;:&quot;comp-kox9rdzr&quot;,&quot;displayMode&quot;:&quot;fill&quot;,&quot;imageData&quot;:{&quot;width&quot;:734,&quot;height&quot;:826,&quot;uri&quot;:&quot;40852c_6823ac1d584d421bb0ac22c8a60fc854~mv2.jpg&quot;,&quot;name&quot;:&quot;Sports Physicals.jpg&quot;,&quot;displayMode&quot;:&quot;fill&quot;}}" data-bg-effect-name="" data-is-svg="false" data-is-svg-mask="false" data-image-zoomed="" data-has-ssr-src="true"><img src="https://static.wixstatic.com/media/40852c_6823ac1d584d421bb0ac22c8a60fc854~mv2.jpg/v1/fill/w_515,h_579,al_c,q_80,usm_0.66_1.00_0.01/Sports%20Physicals.jpg" alt="Sports Physicals.jpg" style="width:536px;height:579px;object-fit:cover;object-position:50% 50%"/></wix-image></div></div><div id="comp-j6vp6uju" class="_26QaB"></div><div id="comp-kekhvm95" class="_2bafp" data-testid="richTextElement"><h2 class="font_2" style="font-size:27px"><span style="font-size: 34px;"><span style="font-family: anton;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(26, 61, 188);"><span style="font-size: 24px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Kelly Slab&quot;;"><span style="font-weight: bold;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="color:#FFC65C"><span style="font-size:27px"><span style="font-family:poppins-extralight,poppins,sans-serif">Head Coach's Message</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></h2></div><div id="comp-kekhwj4w" class="_1v-ms"><div class="_1yvOl"></div></div><div id="comp-kekhv9ww" class="_2bafp" data-testid="richTextElement"><p class="font_8" style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><span style="font-family: din-next-w01-light;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="font-size: 14px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-family:poppins-extralight,poppins,sans-serif"><span style="font-weight:bold">Hello Baron Faithful,</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8" style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><span style="font-family: din-next-w01-light;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="font-size: 14px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-family:poppins-extralight,poppins,sans-serif"><span style="font-weight:bold">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; I would like to take the time to introduce myself. &nbsp;My name is Chris Anderson and I am the new Head Football Coach here at Fountain Valley. &nbsp;For the past nine years I worked in the Newport-Mesa Unified School District, teaching Physical Education and Health, as well as coaching football at Corona del Mar and Newport Harbor High School. &nbsp;I am honored to take over the program here at Fountain Valley and immerse myself within the community.&nbsp; Fountain Valley is truly a special place to be!&nbsp;</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8" style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><span style="font-family: din-next-w01-light;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="font-size: 14px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-family:poppins-extralight,poppins,sans-serif"><span style="font-weight:bold">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Football is an amazing game that teaches a person the values of hard work, discipline, team work, loyalty and self-sacrifice. &nbsp;&nbsp;I take the role of a coach very seriously, never losing track that the young people I work with are students first and athletes second. &nbsp;I work to ensure that each player understand that myself and the football staff care about them personally, their academic success and that we have high expectations for them as people.</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8" style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><span style="font-family: din-next-w01-light;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="font-size: 14px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-family:poppins-extralight,poppins,sans-serif"><span style="font-weight:bold">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; Our Players have been working hard this </span><span style="font-weight:700">off-season</span><span style="font-weight:bold">&nbsp;both in the weight room and on the field. They are incredibly excited about the upcoming season and representing the community of Fountain Valley. &nbsp;The theme of the Fountain Valley Football Program is “Attitude and Effort.”&nbsp; I firmly believe that a person’s attitude and effort in life are the two areas that they have complete control over.&nbsp; The expectation for all of our players is to respond positively to adversity (attitude) and give maximum effort in everything they undertake. &nbsp;A person’s enthusiasm is contagious, and our staff and players will actively show our enthusiasm, hoping to have it rub off on those around us.</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8" style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><span style="font-family: din-next-w01-light;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="font-size: 14px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-family:poppins-extralight,poppins,sans-serif"><span style="font-weight:bold">&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp; As we move closer to kickoff this fall, your support/love of the program cannot be understated. &nbsp;The community at-large is the backbone of all truly successful programs, and Fountain Valley is no different. &nbsp;I want to thank all of you who have supported the program over the years.&nbsp; I look forward to getting to know many of you over the coming months, please feel free to introduce yourself should you see me in public. &nbsp;Extremely proud to be a Baron!</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8" style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><span style="font-family: din-next-w01-light;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="font-size: 14px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-family:poppins-extralight,poppins,sans-serif"><span style="font-weight:bold">&nbsp;</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8" style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><span style="font-family: din-next-w01-light;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="font-size: 14px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-family:poppins-extralight,poppins,sans-serif"><span style="font-weight:bold">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Sincerely,</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></p>

<p class="font_8" style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-size: 15px;"><span style="font-family: din-next-w01-light;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(0, 0, 0);"><span style="font-size: 14px;"><span style="font-family: &quot;Open Sans&quot;;"><span style="font-weight: normal;"><span style="font-style: normal;"><span style="font-variant: normal;"><span style="color: rgb(255, 255, 255);"><span style="font-size:17px"><span style="font-family:poppins-extralight,poppins,sans-serif"><span style="font-weight:bold">&nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; &nbsp; Chris Anderson</span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></span></p></div><div id="comp-kekhw8fd" class="Ued3M" title=""><div data-testid="linkElement"
